news.t: ETFs to Navigate the Tech Euphoria and Inflation Collision
Beat the CPI Heat: Natural Resource ETFs as an Inflation Hedge
Weak Jobs Numbers Won't Derail a Hot Economy. 3 ETFs to Buy.

holdings.infoBox: GUNR is an equity ETF with a total of 168 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 5.01%, Corteva at 4.91%, BHP Group at 4.86%, Nutrien at 4.43%, and Shell at 3.99%.

overview.description: The FlexShares Morningstar Global Upstream Natural Resources Index Fund (GUNR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of global companies that operate, manage or produce natural resources in energy, agriculture, metals, timber or water. GUNR was launched on Sep 16, 2011 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: Morningstar Global Upstream Natural Resources Index

data.text: With the U.S. economy grappling with persistent energy shocks and rising electricity costs, inflation expectations for the next five years have climbed to their highest levels in four years. For finan...

data.title: Beat the CPI Heat: Natural Resource ETFs as an Inflation Hedge
data.text: Fears of hotter-than-expected inflation were realized today. Consumer Price Index (CPI) data revealed that headline CPI rose 0.6% month-over-month in April.

data.title: Weak Jobs Numbers Won't Derail a Hot Economy. 3 ETFs to Buy.
data.text: Despite the job losses reported by ADP, the economic picture isn't so scary. Here are three ETFs that offer exposure to areas of growth, according to Sevens Report's Tom Essaye.
